name: Large Wood Bin with Wheels - Brightroom™
description:
Decluttering your home will be a breeze with this Large Wood Bin with Wheels from Brightroom™. Made of wood, this open-top bin has slats on the sides plus cutouts for easy holding. Designed in a rectangular shape, this wooden bin is great for storing bags, toys, clothes, books and more, and the wheels allow you to maneuver it easily from room to room.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
